name: Registry Check
description: Mandatory pre-flight before creating ANY folder, MCP, service account, OAuth scope, Workspace account/OU, Drive structure, Firestore collection, GitHub repo, Cloud Run service, secret, cron job, systemd unit, or webhook — check the authoritative registry first, verify the asset does not already exist, and register on creation.
origin: GV2 WS-B batch 2 — converted from hookify `intent-no-create-without-registry-check` (a dumb context-injector, event:prompt used only to inject guidance, not to detect a violation) by SHINOB1 sub-seat shinob1-build-wsb-atlas-skill
format_note: Structured to mirror Skill #001 (case-drive-checklist) and the ratified pilot (atlas-consult, PR #56) — SKILL.md + gates.md + surface.html + skill.json, per HIKARI-confirmed WS-C reconciliation (2026-07-08): the tooling-enforced 4-file _RPI_STANDARDS/skills/ shape is canonical for fleet-registered skills, distinct from RAIDEN's single-file docs/warriors/raiden/skills/ convention used for warrior-specific verify runbooks.
